descriptions.text: After the real lanes are closed, where can you go to score that perfect 300? Lighter than a real bowling ball and more portable than a real bowling lane, AMF Bowling is where it's at baby!

AMF Bowling (AMF Bowling Worldwide) was a major operator of bowling centers and major manufacturer of bowling equipment.
The AMF brand continues in use by the following companies:

Lucky Strike Entertainment Corporation uses the name as one of its three brands for bowling centers in the United States and Mexico
Hollywood Bowl Group uses the name for some bowling centers in the United Kingdom
QubicaAMF Worldwide acquired the manufacturing operations of AMF, and continues to use the brand on bowling equipment.
